plugins.name: BCrypt Hash Generator
plugins.description: Hashes a password with bcrypt at a configurable cost factor using a pure-JS implementation.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Bytes Formatter
plugins.description: Converts raw byte counts to human-readable sizes in both SI (KB, MB, GB) and binary (KiB, MiB, GiB) units.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return /^\d[\d,_]*\s*(bytes?|b|kb|mb|gb|kib|mib|gib)?$/i.test(t) ? 0.92 : 0;

plugins.name: CSS Units Converter
plugins.description: Converts between px, rem, em, pt, and vw CSS units given a base font size and viewport width.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return /[\d.]+\s*(px|rem|em|pt|vw)\b/i.test(t) ? 0.93 : 0;

plugins.name: CSV Pretty Viewer
plugins.description: Renders CSV as a fixed-width ASCII table for quick visual inspection.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: CSV → Markdown Table
plugins.description: Converts CSV data into an aligned Markdown pipe table.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Date Difference Calculator
plugins.description: Detects two dates in the input and outputs the difference in days, weeks, months, and business days.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const dates = input.match(/\b\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\b/g) || [];
return dates.length >= 2 ? 0.95 : 0;

plugins.name: Docker Compose Inspector
plugins.description: Summarizes services, ports, volumes, environment variables, and dependencies from a Docker Compose file.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return /^\s*services\s*:/m.test(t) && /^\s{2,}\w[\w-]*\s*:/m.test(t) ? 0.95 : 0;

plugins.name: Duration Calculator
plugins.description: Converts plain English durations (e.g. '2 hours 45 minutes') to seconds and vice versa.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Emoji Picker / Searcher
plugins.description: Search and copy emojis by name or keyword. Outputs the character, its name, and Unicode code point.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: .env File Inspector
plugins.description: Lists all variables, flags empty values, and redacts common secret key names.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Fake Credit Card Generator
plugins.description: Generates Luhn-valid test card numbers for major networks (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) — for testing only.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Fake Person Data Generator
plugins.description: Generates fake names, emails, phone numbers, and addresses for test data.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Find & Replace
plugins.description: Multi-pattern find and replace. Define rules as lines of 'find -> replace', then a '---' delimiter, then the text to process. Supports regex with the /regex/flags syntax.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode: return /^.+->.*$/m.test(input) && /^-{3,}$/m.test(input) ? 0.92 : 0;

plugins.name: GraphQL Formatter
plugins.description: Pretty-prints GraphQL queries, mutations, and fragments with consistent indentation.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return (/\b(query|mutation|subscription|fragment|type|schema|interface|enum|input)\b/.test(t) && t.includes('{')) ? 0.92 : 0;

plugins.name: GraphQL Query Inspector
plugins.description: Validates and summarizes a GraphQL query or mutation — fields, variables, and operation name.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return (/\b(query|mutation|subscription|fragment)\b/.test(t) && t.includes('{') && t.includes('}')) ? 0.95 : 0;

plugins.name: Heading & Outline Extractor
plugins.description: Pulls all Markdown or HTML headings into a clean document outline.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: HTTP Headers Inspector
plugins.description: Parses raw HTTP request/response headers and explains each one (caching, CORS, security headers, etc.).
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: INI / Config Formatter
plugins.description: Cleans up .ini and .cfg config files with consistent spacing and section ordering.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: IP Address Inspector
plugins.description: Detects IPv4/IPv6 addresses, classifies each as private/loopback/public, and shows binary and hex representations.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Locale Code Lookup
plugins.description: Enter a locale ID (1033), country name (China), or country code (CN) to get full locale information including locale ID, language, country, locale code, and more.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Log Formatter
plugins.description: Detects structured log lines (JSON logs, nginx, Apache) and pretty-prints them with level highlighting.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Markdown Table → CSV
plugins.description: Converts a Markdown pipe table into CSV format.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const hasTable = /^\|.+\|/m.test(input) && /^\|[-| :]+\|/m.test(input);
return hasTable ? 0.97 : 0;

plugins.name: Markdown → Word (.docx)
plugins.description: Convert Markdown to a fully-formatted Word document (.docx). Supports H1–H6 headers, bold, italic, bold-italic, inline code, tables, ordered/unordered lists, blockquotes, horizontal rules, hyperlinks, and paragraphs.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Multi-Timezone Converter
plugins.description: Takes a datetime string and shows it across 12 major timezones simultaneously.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Number Formatter
plugins.description: Takes a raw number and outputs it in multiple formats: locale string, scientific notation, hex, binary, and ordinal.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return /^-?[\d,_]+\.?\d*([eE][+-]?\d+)?$/.test(t) ? 0.92 : 0;

plugins.name: Number Sequence Generator
plugins.description: Generates arithmetic, geometric, Fibonacci, or random integer sequences.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Passive Voice Detector
plugins.description: Flags sentences using passive voice constructions and provides a pass/fail ratio.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const words = input.trim().split(/\s+/).length;
return words > 10 ? 0.75 : 0;

plugins.name: Proto Formatter
plugins.description: Formats Protocol Buffer (.proto) definition files with consistent indentation and spacing.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return (/\b(syntax|message|enum|service|rpc|import|package|option)\b/.test(t) && t.includes('{')) ? 0.95 : 0;

plugins.name: Readability Scorer
plugins.description: Computes Flesch Reading Ease and Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level for any prose block.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const words = input.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
return words > 20 ? Math.min(0.85, 0.4 + words / 1000) : 0;

plugins.name: Reading Time Estimator
plugins.description: Estimates slow, average, and fast reading time for any prose block.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const words = input.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
return words > 10 ? Math.min(0.9, 0.5 + words / 2000) : 0;

plugins.name: Semver Inspector
plugins.description: Parses semantic version strings, explains major/minor/patch/prerelease components, and compares two versions if two are present.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode: return /\bv?\d+\.\d+\.\d+/.test(input.trim()) ? 0.93 : 0;

plugins.name: Sentence Splitter
plugins.description: Puts each sentence on its own line. Useful for translation prep or subtitle editing.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Slug Generator
plugins.description: Converts any title or phrase into a URL-friendly slug.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Temperature Converter
plugins.description: Converts between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin. Detects the unit from context.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const t = input.trim();
return /[-\d.]+\s*°?\s*[CcFfKk]\b/.test(t) ? 0.95 : 0;

plugins.name: Text Diff
plugins.description: Shows line-by-line differences between two blocks of text. Separate the two blocks with a line containing only '---'.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode: return /^-{3,}$/m.test(input.trim()) ? 0.9 : 0;

plugins.name: Timestamp Batch Generator
plugins.description: Produces a sequence of timestamps at a configurable interval and format.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Timestamp
plugins.description: Generates timestamps in various formats — Unix epoch, ISO 8601, or RFC 2822.

plugins.name: TOML Formatter
plugins.description: Formats and validates TOML files — normalizes spacing around '=' and between sections.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: TOML Inspector
plugins.description: Parses TOML and displays key-value pairs in a readable summary with section grouping.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Whitespace Normalizer
plugins.description: Collapses multiple spaces, strips trailing whitespace, and normalizes line endings to LF.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech

plugins.name: Word Frequency Analyzer
plugins.description: Ranks words by occurrence, excluding common stopwords. Great for spotting overused words.
plugins.author: Mangosteen Tech
plugins.detectCode:
const words = input.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
return words > 10 ? Math.min(0.88, 0.4 + words / 2000) : 0;
